title: Grey out task name when status is completed
excerpt: When a status is updated to complete, the task/item remains black, so asides from the different colour status, there is no difference in the colour. If it were to grey out (status would need to be identified as complete)…

posts.author: dawnasks (Dawn)
posts.cookedHtml: When a status is updated to complete, the task/item remains black, so asides from the different colour status, there is no difference in the colour. If it were to grey out (status would need to be identified as complete), it would bring focus to other tasks/items that were incomplete. Thank you
